name: HWM_TM_REP_XFR_QUERY_4PYR_V
query: SELECT CALC_REC_GRP_ID TM_REC_GRP_ID, CALC_REC_GRP_VERSION TM_REC_GRP_VERSION, RESOURCE_ID PERSON_ID, SUBRESOURCE_ID ASSIGNMENT_ID, XFR_READY_REC_GRP_ID, MARK_FOR_TRANSFER, START_TIME, STOP_TIME FROM HWM_XFR_READY_REC_GRP WHERE TCSMRS_ID = (SELECT TCSMRS_ID FROM HWM_TCSMRS_B WHERE TCSMRS_CODE = 'PYR' ) AND XFR_STATUS = 1
